Abstract: Hyper-relational knowledge graphs (HKGs) effectively represent complex facts. While inferring new knowledge in HKGs is a critical problem, current methods cast it as a simple link prediction, assuming that nearly all entities and relations within a fact are known, leaving only a single blank to be filled. However, this restricted assumption may not hold in real-world scenarios in which multiple, or even all, constituent components of a fact may be missing simultaneously. To bridge this gap, we introduce a task called fact generation: generating a valid hyper-relational fact from an arbitrarily masked query, i.e., completing a partially observed fact or generating a fact from scratch. We propose KREPE, the first generative representation learning method for HKGs that learns to model the probability distributions of missing components conditioned on the local fact components and global structure of HKGs via a masked discrete diffusion. KREPE models both the intra-fact dependencies by contextual message passing and inter-fact correlations by aggregating stochastically sampled contexts. KREPE seamlessly unifies link prediction and fact generation within a single training framework, achieving state-of-the-art performance on standard HKG link prediction benchmarks and outperforming LLM-based baselines in generating novel and correct facts.

</details>


### [439] [Not All Transitions Matter: Evidence from PPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24071)
*Ajhesh Basnet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现on-policy强化学习中连续轨迹存在梯度冗余问题，提出通过随机丢弃25%的过渡样本来打破这种重复结构，在五个环境中验证该方法在不影响奖励的前提下显著提升了训练稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: on-policy强化学习中，连续轨迹的状态间存在因果依赖关系，导致梯度信号高度重复，价值网络难以跟上策略变化，训练出现隐性不稳定。

Method: 在PPO训练中，从收集到的轨迹中随机丢弃固定比例（25%）的过渡样本，保留奖励信号的同时打破梯度的重复结构，不修改核心算法。

Result: 在CartPole-v1等五个环境中，该方法在奖励上与原始PPO持平，但在KL散度、策略熵和价值估计上表现出更一致且稳定的训练动态。

Conclusion: 简单随机丢弃过渡样本足以解决on-policy训练中的梯度冗余问题，25%的丢弃率是最佳折中——足够打破冗余又不过度减少批量大小。

Abstract: Training a reinforcement learning agent on-policy means collecting fresh experience at every update, and that experience comes with a hidden problem. Each state in a rollout is the direct output of the previous one, causally chained together by the agent's own actions. Because of this, consecutive transitions are never truly independent. They carry overlapping information, and the gradient signal the network receives ends up far more repetitive than the batch size suggests. The same directions get reinforced over and over, the value network struggles to keep up as the policy shifts, and training becomes quietly unstable in ways that reward curves alone rarely reveal.
  This paper asks whether that redundancy can simply be removed. We show that randomly dropping a fixed fraction of transitions from the rollout, at the right stage so the reward signal stays intact, is enough to break the repetitive gradient structure and stabilize training. The change is minimal: one sampling step, no new components, no modification to the core algorithm, and it works with any PPO implementation. Across five environments of increasing difficulty, CartPole-v1, Acrobot-v1, LunarLander-v2, HalfCheetah-v5, and Hopper-v5, the method matches vanilla PPO on reward while producing more consistent training dynamics across KL divergence, policy entropy, and value estimates. Dropping 25% of transitions turns out to be the sweet spot: enough to disrupt the redundancy, not enough to thin the batch.

</details>


### [440] [Verified SHAP: Provable Bounds for Exact Shapley Values of Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24084)
*David Boetius,Shahaf Bassan,Guy Katz,Stefan Leue,Tobias Sutter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种利用神经网络验证技术来精确计算SHAP值的算法，能够处理比现有方法大数个数量级的搜索空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SHAP值对于神经网络在计算上被认为是难以处理的，因为其搜索空间随输入特征指数增长。现有精确方法只能处理小规模问题，亟需可扩展的精确计算方法。

Method: 利用神经网络验证领域的最新进展，通过计算SHAP值的任意紧致的精确下界和上界，最终恢复精确的SHAP值。

Result: 该方法能处理的搜索空间比现有最先进的精确方法大数个数量级。

Conclusion: 为精确计算大规模神经网络的SHAP值迈出了重要一步，并为评估统计近似方法提供了原则性基准。

Abstract: Shapley additive explanations (SHAP) are widely recognised as computationally intractable for neural networks, since they induce an exponential search space over the input features. In this work, we take a first step towards scaling exact SHAP computation to larger search spaces by introducing an algorithm that leverages recent advances in neural network verification to compute arbitrarily tight exact lower and upper bounds on SHAP values for neural networks, ultimately recovering the exact SHAP values. We demonstrate that our approach scales to orders of magnitude larger search spaces than state-of-the-art exact methods. This provides an important first step towards exact SHAP computation and establishes a principled cornerstone for evaluating statistical approximation methods on larger search spaces.

</details>


### [441] [Overcoming "Physics Shock" in Earth Observation A Heteroscedastic Uncertainty Framework for PINN-based Flood Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24106)
*Tewodros Syum Gebre,Jagrati Talreja,Matilda Anokye,Leila Hashemi-Beni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对SAR遥感数据洪水制图，提出不确定性感知的物理信息神经网络（PINN），通过动态热身协议和异方差不确定性建模解决物理冲击问题，在Sen1Floods11数据集上IoU提升25%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准深度学习模型在洪水遥感制图中缺乏水文约束，预测结果违反物理规律；现有PINN方法在真实SAR数据上因噪声导致梯度发散（物理冲击），亟需一种能自适应松弛物理约束的稳定框架。

Method: 提出不确定性感知PINN框架：1) 动态Warm-Start协议稳定训练；2) 用负对数似然建模异方差偶然不确定性，使网络在噪声区域自动放松物理约束；3) 采用注意力门控FNO-UNet架构；4) 结合Deep Ensembles区分传感器噪声与分布外地形不确定性。

Result: 在Sen1Floods11数据集上，相较于确定性基线模型，IoU相对提升25%，且能提供校准良好、物理一致的置信区间。

Conclusion: 该框架有效解决了PINN在真实遥感数据上的训练不稳定性，为灾害响应和实时决策提供了可信赖的概率性洪水制图工具。

Abstract: Rapid and accurate flood extent mapping from Remote Sensing data, such as Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), is critical for operational disaster response, but standard Deep Learning models often produce physically impossible predictions due to a lack of hydrological constraints. While PhysicsInformed Neural Networks (PINNs) attempt to address this by embedding governing laws directly into the loss function, their application to real-world remote sensing data frequently fails. Enforcing rigid spatial derivatives (e.g., the 2D Shallow Water Equations) onto unconditioned latent spaces attempting to fit noisy SAR speckle causes catastrophic gradient divergence, a phenomenon we term Physics Shock. In this paper, we propose a novel Uncertainty-Aware PINN framework tailored specifically for applied Earth Observation that addresses this instability. By integrating a dynamic Warm-Start protocol and modeling heteroscedastic aleatoric uncertainty via a negative log-likelihood objective, the network learns to dynamically relax physical constraints in regions of high sensor noise while strictly enforcing them in high-confidence areas. Evaluated on the Sen1Floods11 dataset, our probabilistic Attention-Gated FNO-UNet successfully stabilizes multi-objective optimization, achieving a +25% relative improvement in Intersection over Union (IoU) compared to deterministic baselines. Furthermore, through Deep Ensembles, we successfully disentangle intrinsic sensor noise from out-of-distribution terrain ignorance, providing operational agencies with highly calibrated, physically consistent confidence bounds for robust disaster mitigation and real-time decision-making.

</details>


### [442] [Riemannian Archetypal Analysis: Interpretable non-linear data analysis on deformed star distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24113)
*Willem Diepeveen,Deanna Needell*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动拉回几何的黎曼原型分析（RAM），通过变形星分布和黎曼几何将经典原型分析的可解释性与非线性模型的表达能力相结合，在合成数据和MNIST上展现了有意义的测地线、去噪投影和几何感知分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典原型分析线性几何在处理非线性结构数据时性能受限，而现有的神经扩展方法虽然提高了灵活性，但往往削弱了原型和插值的几何意义。目标是将可解释性与非线性表达能力相结合。

Method: 1) 提出变形星分布及其拉回黎曼几何；2) 定义黎曼原型映射（RAM）为原型测地凸组合流形上的投影；3) 提出基于凸松弛+非凸细化的优化方案；4) 设计从数据学习变形星分布的学习方案。

Result: 在合成数据和MNIST上，RAM生成了有意义的测地线、有效的去噪投影和几何感知分类，同时也揭示了当前优化的局限性。

Conclusion: RAM成功结合了可解释性和非线性表达能力，但优化方面仍有改进空间，为后续研究指明了方向。

Abstract: Classical archetypal analysis is appealing for its interpretability, but its linear geometry can limit performance on data with strongly non-linear structure; at the same time, existing neural extensions improve flexibility while often weakening the geometric meaning of archetypes and interpolations. In this work, we develop a Riemannian version of archetypal analysis based on data-driven pullback geometry for real-valued data, with the goal of combining the interpretability of classical archetypal analysis with the expressive power of modern non-linear models. We introduce a class of deformed star distributions together with associated pullback Riemannian geometry to provide a statistical interpretation of the resulting manifold mappings, define the Riemannian archetypal mapping (RAM) as a projection onto the manifold of geodesically convex combinations of archetypes, and propose a practical optimization scheme based on convex relaxation followed by non-convex refinement. We further propose a learning scheme that yields reasonable, albeit generally suboptimal, deformed star distributions from data. Experiments on synthetic examples and MNIST show that the resulting framework produces meaningful geodesics, useful denoising projections, and geometry-aware classifications, while also clarifying where current optimization limitations remain.

</details>


### [443] [Knowledge Graph Modulated Deep Learning for Limited-Sample Clinical Data Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24162)
*Yuwei Xue,Sakib Mostafa,James Zou,Joseph Liao,Maximilian Diehn,Ash A. Alizadeh,Lei Xing,Md. Tauhidul Islam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Graph-in-Graph (GiG)框架，将患者数据表示为以生物知识图谱定义边的模块化图，在近9700名患者和5项临床任务中显著优于传统方法，尤其在小样本场景下，前列腺癌诊断任务macro-F1提升高达49个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物系统本质上是图结构（通路、调控回路等），但现有AI模型无法直接利用图编码的生物知识，需压缩为低维表示导致信息丢失，尤其在样本有限的临床研究中性能下降。

Method: GiG将每位患者构建为独立模块化图：由 curated 生物知识图谱定义边，患者特异性测量（如基因表达）定义节点特征，实现多知识图谱集成与基因-基因交互、通路拓扑的保留。

Result: 在近9700名患者、5项临床任务中，GiG持续优于传统及SOTA方法；前列腺癌诊断任务macro-F1提升最多达49个百分点；控制实验证实性能提升源于生物学知识图谱结构而非单纯图建模。

Conclusion: 知识图谱调制的深度学习可提升临床数据分析的鲁棒性、可解释性和样本效率，为将生物知识图谱整合到预测建模中提供了原则性框架。

Abstract: Biological systems are governed by structured molecular interactions, where pathways, regulatory circuits, and functional gene relationships shape cellular behavior and disease progression. Much of this knowledge is naturally represented as graphs. However, most biomedical AI models cannot directly use graph-encoded biological knowledge and instead require compressed low-dimensional representations, which can lose important structure and reduce performance, especially in limited-sample clinical studies. Here, we introduce Graph-in-Graph (GiG), a knowledge graph-modulated deep learning framework for data-efficient clinical prediction. GiG represents each patient as a standalone modular graph, in which curated biological knowledge graphs define edges and patient-specific measurements, such as gene expression, define node features. This design allows multiple biological knowledge graphs to be integrated while preserving gene-gene interactions and pathway topology during patient-level representation learning. Across cohorts comprising nearly 9,700 patients and five clinical tasks, including liquid biopsy cancer detection, prostate cancer diagnosis, and 32-class pan-cancer classification, GiG consistently outperforms traditional and state-of-the-art methods, with the largest gains in limited-sample settings. On the challenging prostate cancer diagnosis task, GiG improves macro-F1 by up to 49 percentage points relative to competing methods. Control experiments replacing real pathway graphs with random topologies confirm that these gains arise from biologically grounded knowledge graph structure rather than graph modeling alone. These findings show that knowledge graph-modulated deep learning can improve robustness, interpretability, and sample efficiency in clinical data analysis, and provide a principled framework for integrating biological knowledge graphs into predictive modeling.

</details>


### [444] [PromptAudit: Auditing Prompt Sensitivity in LLM-Based Vulnerability Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24171)
*Steffen J. Camarato,Yahya Hmaiti,Mandana Ghadamian,David Mohaisen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了PromptAudit评估框架，通过固定数据集、解码和解析，仅改变提示策略来评估大语言模型在漏洞检测中的可靠性。研究发现标准思维链提示表现最佳，少样本提示有模型依赖的益处，而自适应思维链和自一致性策略会降低性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型越来越多地被用于漏洞检测，但不同提示公式下其可靠性尚未得到充分表征。

Method: 提出PromptAudit控制评估框架，固定数据集、解码和解析，仅变化提示策略。使用五种提示策略，评估五个开源模型在1000个CVE（6074个代码样本，涵盖16种编程语言）上的准确率、召回率、弃权率、覆盖率和有效F1分数。

Result: 标准思维链提示在整体操作性能上最强；少样本提示提供模型依赖的收益，对提示敏感的模型效果最明显；自适应思维链经常抑制召回率，自一致性导致过度弃权，显著降低有效性能。

Conclusion: 漏洞检测行为由模型和提示共同决定，提示敏感性是一等系统属性，必须在评估和部署中明确表征。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used for vulnerability detection, yet their reliability under different prompt formulations remains uncharacterized. We present PromptAudit, a controlled evaluation framework that isolates prompt effects by fixing the dataset, decoding, and parsing while varying only the prompting strategy. Using five prompting strategies across five open-weight models on 1,000 CVEs (6,074 code samples spanning 16 programming languages), we evaluate accuracy, recall, abstention, coverage, and effective F1. We find that standard chain-of-thought prompting achieves the strongest overall operational performance, while few-shot prompting provides model-dependent benefits that are most pronounced for prompt-sensitive models. In contrast, adaptive chain-of-thought frequently suppresses recall and self-consistency induces excessive abstention, sharply reducing effective performance. These results show that vulnerability detection behavior is jointly determined by the model and the prompt, and that prompt sensitivity is a first-class system property that must be explicitly characterized in evaluation and deployment.

</details>


### [445] [Filtered Posterior Mean Collections: A Unified Framework for Analytical Models of Diffusion Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24192)
*Matthew Niedoba,Berend Zwartsenberg,Frank Wood*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出统一模型类Filtered Posterior Mean Collections (FPMCs)，通过查询精度向量、响应权重和源分布三个设计轴解释现有去噪方法，并通过软松弛和源分布增强提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图像扩散模型中的神经网络去噪函数在不同架构和超参数下表现出惊人的泛化一致性，现有研究试图通过聚合训练数据集补丁的后验加权平均来建模这些网络输出。本文旨在整合这些方法并统一建模。

Method: 提出Filtered Posterior Mean Collections (FPMCs)统一模型类，包含查询精度向量、响应权重和源分布三个设计轴；对现有基于补丁的方法进行软松弛改进，并通过增强源分布来提升性能。

Result: 在三个自然图像数据集上，应用改进后的FPMC方法一致地提升了样本质量。

Conclusion: FPMC是一个有效的统一框架，通过优化设计轴（软松弛和源分布增强）可以持续改善图像扩散模型的去噪生成效果。

Abstract: The neural-network denoising functions which form the backbone of image diffusion models are remarkably consistent in their generalization behaviour across a wide variety of network architectures and training procedure hyperparameters. A recent line of research has sought to model the outputs of these networks by aggregating posterior weighted averages of training dataset patches. In this work, we consolidate these approaches into a unified model class which we call Filtered Posterior Mean Collections (FPMCs). We define this model class using query precision vectors, response weights, and source distributions, and illustrate that existing methods are recoverable with specific choices of these design axes. Investigating each axis in turn, we find that FPMC performance can be improved with soft relaxations of prior patch-based methods, and through augmentations of source distributions. Applying these findings to an existing FPMC, we demonstrate consistent sample improvement across three natural image datasets.

</details>


### [446] [Characterizing the Representational Capacity of Neural Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24210)
*Robin Young*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文严格证明了各类神经过程（CNP、ANP、ConvCNP、TNP、隐变量NP）的表达能力存在层级关系：CNP只能表示依赖有限期望特征的函数，ANP通过查询依赖重加权实现核平滑器从而严格泛化CNP，ConvCNP与ANP不可比较（平稳性与平移等变性分离），TNP的L层自注意力捕获L跳上下文交互，隐变量NP的有限维潜变量无法规避编码器限制，匹配GP后验需潜变量维度随上下文规模扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经过程（NPs）家族拥有多种架构，但不同架构能表征哪些函数尚不明确。作者旨在从理论上严格刻画CNP、ANP、TNP及隐变量NP的表达能力层级，为实际应用中根据任务结构选择架构提供理论基础。

Method: 通过数学分析，对CNP、ANP、ConvCNP、TNP和隐变量NP的表示能力进行严格的形式化比较。证明各类架构之间的包含关系、不可比关系，并分析隐变量维度与表达能力之间的权衡。

Result: 建立了NP架构的严格层级：CNP ⊂ ANP（严格包含），ConvCNP与ANP不可比，TNP的L层自注意力能捕获L跳上下文交互，有限维隐变量不能弥补编码器局限，匹配GP后验需要潜变量维度随上下文大小线性增长。

Conclusion: 不同NP架构的表达能力有本质差异，应根据任务特性（是否需要核平滑、平稳性、长程依赖等）选择合适架构，隐变量NP的采样一致性以表示能力为代价。

Abstract: What functions can Neural Processes represent? We analyze the representational capacity of popular NP architectures: Conditional Neural Processes (CNPs), Attentive Neural Processes (ANPs), Transformer Neural Processes (TNPs), and their latent variants. We prove these architectures form a strict hierarchy. CNP-representable functions are exactly those depending on finitely many expected features of the context distribution. ANPs strictly generalize CNPs via query-dependent reweighting, enabling kernel smoothers. ConvCNPs and ANPs are incomparable; each contains functions outside the other, separated by stationarity versus translation equivariance. TNPs with $L$ self-attention layers capture $L$-hop context interactions. For latent NPs, we show finite-dimensional latents provide coherent sampling but do not circumvent encoder limitations; matching GP posterior distributions requires latent dimension scaling with context size. These results provide a theoretical foundation for architecture selection based on task structure.

</details>


### [447] [Agent-ToM: Learning to Monitor Autonomous LLM Agents via Theory-of-Mind Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24216)
*Nesreen K. Ahmed,Nima Nafisi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Agent-ToM是一个基于心智理论（ToM）推理的框架，用于监控自主LLM代理的隐蔽恶意行为。它通过推理信念、意图假设和偏差检测，结合Reason-Verify-Refine流程和语义护栏记忆，在对抗性代理监控基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有监控方法将每条轨迹独立处理，无法从先前的监控经验中学习；且标准推理方法只解释观察到的行为，而不显式推理代理的信念、意图和目标对齐，难以区分良性任务执行与隐蔽偏差。

Method: 提出Agent-ToM框架，采用结构化全轨迹分析：推断信念、意图假设及置信度校准、预期行为和偏差。推理时使用Reason-Verify-Refine流程构建和验证监控决策；训练时将批评信号蒸馏到持久的语义护栏记忆中，实现跨回合可复用的信念和意图条件约束。

Result: 在SHADE-Arena和CUA-SHADE-Arena基准上，Agent-ToM实现了强精确率-召回率平衡，优于包括集成方法在内的SOTA监控基线，且仅使用两调用推理流程。

Conclusion: 在监控层进行学习，结合结构化ToM推理和验证，为保障自主LLM代理安全提供了有效且可部署的基础。

Abstract: Monitoring autonomous large language model (LLM) agents for covert malicious behavior is challenging due to delayed, context-dependent, and long-horizon attack patterns. Agents may pursue hidden objectives while maintaining superficially benign behavior, making detection difficult even with full trajectory access. Prior monitoring approaches improve scaffolding or ensemble aggregation, but treat each trajectory independently and do not learn from prior monitoring experience. Moreover, standard reasoning methods explain observed behavior without explicitly reasoning about agent beliefs, intentions, and goal alignment required to distinguish benign task execution from covert deviation.
  We propose \textbf{Agent-ToM}, a learning-to-monitor framework grounded in Theory-of-Mind (ToM) reasoning for security analysis of autonomous agents. Agent-ToM performs structured full-trajectory analysis by inferring beliefs, intent hypotheses with calibrated confidence, expected actions, and deviations from task-consistent behavioral baselines. At inference time, it employs a \textit{Reason-Verify-Refine} pipeline to construct and validate monitoring decisions. At training time, Agent-ToM distills critique signals into a persistent \textit{semantic guardrail memory}, enabling reusable belief- and intent-conditioned constraints across episodes. We evaluate Agent-ToM on adversarial agent monitoring benchmarks (SHADE-Arena and CUA-SHADE-Arena). Agent-ToM achieves strong precision-recall balance and outperforms state-of-the-art monitoring baselines, including ensemble methods, while using a coherent two-call reasoning pipeline. These results demonstrate that learning at the monitoring layer, combined with structured ToM reasoning and verification, provides an effective and deployable foundation for securing autonomous LLM agents.

</details>


### [448] [PrivFusion: A Privacy-preserving Multi-Agent Framework for Harmonizing Distributed Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24249)
*Anisa Halimi,Liubov Nedoshivina,Kieran Fraser,Stefano Braghin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PrivFusion是一个隐私保护的多智能体框架，能够自动对分布式医疗机构的结构化数据进行特征语义对齐和标准化，无需人工干预，有效解决了联邦学习中数据异质性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中各机构数据集存在显著异质性，数据标准化是跨站点分析的关键前提但常被忽视，现有方法缺乏自动化、隐私保护的解决方案。

Method: 提出PrivFusion框架：利用多智能体分析本地数据，聚类各站点语义相似的特征，提供迭代的转换建议直至数据对齐，全程保持隐私保护。

Result: 在四个异质的COVID-19数据集上评估，PrivFusion能够高效、有效地实现多站点数据标准化，同时大幅减少人工工作量。

Conclusion: PrivFusion是首个自动化、隐私保护的联邦学习前数据标准化框架，显著提升了跨机构数据分析的可行性和效率。

Abstract: The growing availability of clinical data has increased the use of machine learning, yet centralized data aggregation is often infeasible for sensitive health information. Federated Learning (FL) offers a distributed alternative, but its adoption is limited by substantial heterogeneity across institutional datasets, making harmonization a critical but frequently overlooked prerequisite for multi-site analytics. We introduce PrivFusion, a privacy-preserving multi-agent framework that automates the harmonization of structured datasets prior to federated training. PrivFusion uses agents to analyze local data, cluster semantically similar features across sites, and provide iterative transformation recommendations until alignment is achieved. Evaluation across four heterogeneous COVID-19 datasets demonstrates that PrivFusion effectively and efficiently harmonizes multi-site data while substantially reducing manual effort.

</details>


### [449] [Rethinking Continual Anomaly Detection on the Edge: Benchmarking Under Realistic Industrial Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24251)
*Chad Weatherly,Sen Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出现有持续异常检测（CAD）方法存在评估不现实、缺乏系统比较、未考虑边缘部署约束三大缺陷。作者构建统一基准并发现现有方法并不总能超越简单的经验回放策略，进而提出无训练方法DINOSaur，其结合冻结的DINOv3骨干网络、空间索引核心集记忆与邻域受限异常评分，在所有协议上均优于现有方法，且推理延迟低于100ms，设备端适应新任务不超过30秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CAD方法存在三个关键缺陷：评估场景不现实（缺乏统一基准）、缺乏系统性对比、未考虑边缘设备部署约束。作者希望填补这些空白，建立一个公平统一的评估框架。

Method: 提出DINOSaur方法：1）使用冻结的DINOv3作为骨干网络（无训练）；2）空间索引的核心集记忆机制（spatially-indexed coreset memory）；3）邻域受限的异常评分（neighborhood-restricted anomaly scoring）。该方法天然实现零遗忘。

Result: 1）构建了统一基准，包含离散任务评估、连续漂移协议以及首个所有已发表CAD方法的头对头对比；2）发现现有CAD方法并不始终优于简单经验回放的传统方法；3）DINOSaur在所有五种评估协议上均优于所有对比方法；4）在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上推理延迟低于100ms，新任务设备端适配不超过30秒。

Conclusion: DINOSaur是首个兼顾性能与边缘部署约束的无训练CAD方法，通过冻结主干网络和精心设计的记忆机制，同时解决了持续学习中的灾难性遗忘和边缘设备的计算瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Continual anomaly detection (CAD) addresses the need for industrial inspection systems to adapt to evolving production conditions, yet existing methods share three critical gaps: unrealistic evaluation, no systematic comparison, and no consideration of edge deployment constraints. We introduce a unified benchmark combining discrete-task evaluation on structural and logical anomalies, a novel continuous drift protocol, the first head-to-head comparison of all published CAD methods, and computational efficiency profiling on edge hardware. Our results reveal that existing CAD methods do not consistently outperform traditional approaches with simple experience replay. Thus motivated, we propose DINOSaur, a training-free method combining a frozen DINOv3 backbone with spatially-indexed coreset memory and neighborhood-restricted anomaly scoring. DINOSaur achieves zero forgetting by construction, outperforms all evaluated methods across all five protocols, and runs at sub-100\,ms inference on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, with on-device adaptation to new tasks in under 30 seconds.

</details>


### [450] [Optimizing Digital Therapeutic Interventions: Online Learning under Endogenous Adherence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24261)
*Eric Pulick,Stephanie Carpenter,Matthew Buman,Yonatan Mintz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个数字疗法决策支持框架，通过线性动态系统同时建模治疗建议和患者依从性对长期健康的影响，并设计了UCB-BOLD在线算法，实验表明其风险后悔值比次优基准低2-3倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 慢性病干预中，患者长期健康管理面临信息和资源有限的问题。现有决策框架只建模治疗建议效果，或将依从性视为外生变量，忽略了治疗建议与过去依从性对未来依从性的双向影响，存在模型和算法空白。

Method: 提出一个结合线性动态系统（LDS）和logit链接的决策框架，将治疗建议和依从性内生化建模；给出模型有限时间辨识保证；设计基于乐观主义的在线算法UCB-BOLD，并证明其亚线性后悔界。

Result: 通过基于微随机试验数据的合成患者队列消融实验，UCB-BOLD在条件风险价值后悔指标上比次优基准低2-3倍。

Conclusion: 数字疗法决策工具应纳入动态模型以高效利用数据，对于部分患者类型，显式规划治疗建议与依从性效应的收益显著，优于短视或启发式方法。

Abstract: A critical challenge facing clinicians managing chronic disease interventions is sustaining long-run patient health given limited information and resources. Digital therapeutics (DTs) provide a cost-effective way to manage interventions at scale through repeated interactions (e.g. daily treatment recommendations), but patient success is highly dependent on their adherence. Behavioral psychology suggests that both treatment recommendations and past adherence affect future adherence, yet existing decision support frameworks for DTs model only recommendation effects or treat adherence as exogenous context, leaving a key gap in model and algorithm development. To address this gap, we present a DT decision support framework that captures both recommendation and adherence effects, allowing clinicians to better plan treatment recommendations. We model a patient's time-varying capacity for engagement with treatment using a linear dynamical system (LDS) that captures both recommendation and adherence effects, endogenously connected to adherence behavior with a logit link. We establish finite-time identification guarantees for this model, extending LDS results to our setting. Next, we propose an optimism-based algorithm, UCB-BOLD, for online treatment selection and prove that it achieves sublinear regret. We evaluate UCB-BOLD against benchmarks via ablation studies on a synthetic patient cohort generated using micro-randomized trial data. DT decision support tools can include dynamical models to enable decision makers to efficiently use the data in DT settings to improve patient health through effective resource allocation. While myopic or heuristic approaches suffice for some patient types, the benefits of explicitly planning around recommendation and adherence effects are significant for others; UCB-BOLD achieves 2-3x lower conditional value-at-risk regret than the next-best benchmark.

</details>


### [451] [A lift for input-convex neural network training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24274)
*Ali Siahkoohi,Anirudh Thatipelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种"提升（lift）"方法，通过引入无约束的超网络来替代直接约束ICNN层间权重，解决了投影梯度下降（PGD）的非光滑性和softplus重参数化的梯度衰减问题，在多个任务上取得了更低的测试损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ICNN在log-concave密度估计、归一化流、最优传输等任务中广泛应用，但其层间权重必须非负。现有方法PGD面临非光滑训练景观问题，而softplus重参数化则会导致梯度指数衰减，造成训练停滞。

Method: 受PDE约束逆问题中参数扩展提升方法的启发，本文不直接约束层间权重，而是训练一个无约束的超网络，该超网络根据输入批次的置换不变摘要生成层间权重。通过可学习的偏置、条件化的超网络主体以及批次随机性驱动的交叉协方差，软化损失景观。

Result: 在log-concave能量建模（从一维玩具目标到图像风格潜变量）和21维表格数据的凸势归一化流上，提升方法相比PGD和softplus均达到更低的测试损失，并将平台受限的训练轨迹转变为山谷下降的轨迹。

Conclusion: 通过消融实验证明三个结构成分（可学习偏置、条件化超网络主体、交叉协方差）缺一不可，任何单一成分的缺失都会破坏携带软化效果的交叉协方差。

Abstract: Input-convex neural networks (ICNNs) are widely used for log-concave density estimation, convex-potential normalizing flows, optimal transport, and transport-map inversion for high-dimensional Bayesian posteriors. These tasks share a structural constraint: the inter-layer weights of the ICNN must remain non-negative. The standard recipe, projected gradient descent (PGD) onto the non-negative cone, applies a hard, non-smooth projection -- the stiff-penalty limit of an ADMM-style constraint splitting -- and its classical convergence guarantees do not transfer to the non-smooth ICNN training landscape; the differentiable alternative, softplus reparametrization, attenuates the gradient exponentially in the weight magnitude, stalling training with dead inter-layer weights and plateaued loss. Inspired by parameter-extension lifts of PDE-constrained inverse problems, we propose the lift: instead of constraining the inter-layer weights directly, we train an unconstrained hypernetwork that emits them from a permutation-invariant summary of the input batch. This adds stochasticity to the training dynamics that softens the loss landscape, letting the iterates escape the gradient-attenuated region where direct softplus stalls. We trace this softening to three structural ingredients -- a learnable bias acting as slack, a hypernetwork body that conditions on the target batch, and a cross-covariance coupling the two through batch stochasticity -- and prove each one necessary: deleting any single ingredient collapses the cross-covariance that carries the softening. On log-concave energy-based modeling from one-dimensional toy targets to image-flavored latents, and convex-potential normalizing flows on a 21-dimensional tabular benchmark, we show that the lift reaches a lower test loss than both PGD and direct softplus, and turns a plateau-bounded training trajectory into a valley-descending one.

</details>


### [452] [SemanticZip: A Pilot Framework for Lossy Text Compression with LLMs as Semantic Decompressors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24541)
*Natalia Trukhina,Vadim Vashkelis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SemanticZip框架，将文本压缩为紧凑代码，LLM可解压出任务相关语义。在五种表示方案中评估了压缩率与语义恢复的权衡，结构性散文恢复率最高（WAR=0.956），SemanticZip ASCII提供最大有效压缩（46.5% token增益，WAR=0.802）。核心贡献是可复现的实验接口和有损压缩设计原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM文本压缩多采用token删除、检索、摘要或精确重建。本文追求更激进的有损压缩：将文本压缩为紧凑代码，LLM解压时只恢复任务相关的语义含义，而非字节级完美重建。

Method: 形式化LLM介导的解压缩过程，定义保护/有损数据包架构，在五种表示方案（结构化散文、JSON、CCL-Core、CCL-Min、SemanticZip ASCII、SemanticZip emoji）上评估。使用独立解码器LLM重建类型化语义原子，并计算关键原子召回率、加权原子召回率、精确度和tokenizer增益。

Result: 结构化散文恢复率最高（WAR=0.956，19.1% token增益）；CCL-Min是最佳平衡点（39.4% token增益，WAR=0.874）；SemanticZip ASCII提供最大有效压缩（46.5% token增益，WAR=0.802）；emoji方案在压缩和恢复上均表现较差。

Conclusion: 主要贡献是提供了可复现的实验接口和有损文本压缩的设计原则：安全关键和精确承诺应保持受保护，而可预测的低风险上下文可以进行语义压缩。本文是试点框架而非基准声明。

Abstract: Text compression for large language model (LLM) systems is usually framed as token deletion, retrieval, summarization, or exact reconstruction. We study a more aggressive but explicitly lossy setting: compress text into compact codes that an LLM can expand into task-relevant meaning. We call this setting SemanticZip. Unlike lossless compression, SemanticZip does not require byte-identical reconstruction; unlike ordinary summarization, it treats model-based decompression as part of the codec and evaluates whether task-relevant semantic commitments are recovered.
  This paper is a pilot framework, not a benchmark claim. We formalize LLM-mediated decompression, define a protected/lossy packet architecture, and evaluate six representation regimes over five author-constructed diagnostic cases: structured prose, JSON, CCL-Core, CCL-Min, SemanticZip ASCII, and SemanticZip emoji. An independent decoder LLM reconstructs typed semantic atoms from each compressed representation, and we score Critical Atom Recall, Weighted Atom Recall, precision, and tokenizer gain. In this pilot, structured prose has the highest recoverability, with WAR = 0.956 and 19.1% o200k_base token gain. CCL-Min is the strongest balanced point, with 39.4% token gain and WAR = 0.874. SemanticZip ASCII provides the largest useful compression, with 46.5% token gain and WAR = 0.802, while emoji-heavy SemanticZip performs worse on both compression and recovery.
  The main contribution is not the claim that these numbers establish a universal frontier. Rather, we introduce a reproducible experimental interface for studying lossy, LLM-decompressible text codes and a design principle: safety-critical and exact commitments should remain protected, while predictable low-risk context may be semantically zipped.

</details>


### [453] [Fourier Feature Pyramids for Physics-Informed Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24278)
*Brandon Zhao,Yixuan Wang,Jonathan T. Barron,Katherine L. Bouman,Dor Verbin,Pratul P. Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出beignet模型，用可训练的多分辨率傅里叶特征金字塔替代随机傅里叶特征嵌入，通过傅里叶插值和全连接网络解码求解PDE，在精度和计算效率上超越现有PINN方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PINN方法难以获得高精度解，且计算复杂度随参数量增加而扩展性差。

Method: 提出beignet架构：1) 多分辨率傅里叶特征金字塔替代随机嵌入；2) 傅里叶插值在每个层级查询连续坐标特征；3) 全连接网络解码；4) 利用链式法则结合自动微分与FFT高效计算空间导数。

Result: 在PDE基准测试中，beignet用更少参数获得更精确解；在Burgers自相似爆炸问题上，用Adam优化器即可将残差降至接近机器精度。

Conclusion: beignet通过可扩展的傅里叶特征金字塔实现计算高效的高精度PDE求解，并可直接控制表示带宽以稳定优化。

Abstract: We present an improved neural field architecture for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). Current physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide a flexible framework for solving PDEs, but they struggle to achieve highly accurate solutions and require computation that scales poorly with parameter count. Our model, which we call beignet (Bandlimited Embedding with Interpolated Grid Network), replaces the random Fourier feature embedding used by existing PINN models with a trainable multi-resolution Fourier feature pyramid. To query beignet at a continuous coordinate, we use Fourier interpolation at each level of the pyramid to return features at the input coordinate, and then decode this vector with a fully-connected neural network trunk. Our model provides multiple benefits: 1) Spatial derivatives can be computed efficiently by using the chain rule to compose derivatives of the neural network computed with automatic differentiation with derivatives of the feature grid computed spectrally by the Fast Fourier transform (FFT). 2) beignet can achieve higher accuracy in a compute-efficient manner by scaling the parameter count of this Fourier feature pyramid, instead of the less-efficient strategy of scaling the neural network architecture. 3) beignet can directly control the representation bandlimit, resulting in more stable optimization for difficult PDEs. We demonstrate that beignet finds significantly more accurate solutions on PDE benchmarks using fewer parameters than state-of-the-art PINN methods. We further evaluate beignet on the self-similar inviscid Burgers blowup problem and show that it can minimize residuals to near machine precision using Adam, an accuracy regime previously attained only by using computationally expensive higher-order optimizers.

</details>


### [454] [Faithfulness as Information Flow: Evaluating and Training Faithful Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24286)
*Jinghan Jia,Joe Benton,Eric Easley*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究思维链（CoT）推理的忠实性，通过信息流视角提出基于充分性、完整性和必要性三个互补属性的框架，并引入多种训练时干预方法（如注意力掩码、梯度掩码等），以增强CoT对最终答案的真实反映能力，减少捷径和奖励黑客行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言模型可能绕过CoT推理，直接利用提示到答案的捷径，使得可见的推理过程具有误导性。需要一种方法来衡量和提升CoT推理的忠实性，确保推理过程真实反映计算逻辑。

Method: 提出基于信息流的忠实性框架（充分性、完整性、必要性），使用熵、KL散度和梯度三种诊断指标；并设计四种训练时干预方法：注意力掩码、后向梯度掩码、CoT梯度以及提示表示对抗扰动，用于基于验证器的在线强化学习。

Result: 在暗示算术、奖励黑客代码修复和DAPO-Math等任务上，干预方法使行为与结构指标向更强的CoT中介方向转变，提升忠实性指标，并在某些设置下降低错误提示的敏感性。

Conclusion: 训练过程中控制信息流是提升CoT推理忠实性和可监控性的有效途径。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is useful for monitoring language models only when the reasoning trace faithfully reflects the computation that produces the final answer. However, models can rely on prompt-to-answer shortcuts that bypass the CoT, making the visible reasoning trace misleading even when it appears plausible. We study CoT faithfulness through a structural information-flow perspective: faithful reasoning should route answer-relevant information through the mediated path from prompt to CoT to answer, rather than through a direct prompt-to-answer shortcut. This perspective yields a task-agnostic framework based on three complementary properties, sufficiency, completeness, and necessity, which we instantiate with entropy-based, masked-KL, and gradient-based diagnostics. We show that these metrics recover externally judged faithfulness differences in hinted reasoning, and identify a low-entropy failure mode of KL-based diagnostics where gradient-based measures remain more stable. Building on this analysis, we introduce update-time interventions for verifier-based on-policy RL, including attention masking, backward-only gradient masking, CoT gradients, and adversarial perturbations of prompt representations. Across hinted arithmetic, reward-hackable code repair, and DAPO-Math models trained without hints but evaluated under wrong-hint injection, our interventions shift behavioral and structural indicators toward stronger CoT mediation. In particular, they make shortcut and reward-hacking behavior more transparent in the CoT and improve task-agnostic faithfulness metrics, while in some settings also reducing wrong-hint susceptibility. Our results suggest that controlling information flow during training is a practical route toward more faithful and monitorable CoT reasoning. Code is available at https://github.com/safety-research/faithful-cot.

</details>


### [455] [Selective Test-Time Compute Scaling for Click-Through Rate Prediction via Uncertainty-Triggered Feature Path Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24989)
*Moyu Zhang,Yun Chen,Yujun Jin,Jinxin Hu,Yu Zhang,Xiaoyi Zeng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出UTTSI，一种无需训练的、模型无关的测试时选择性推理框架，通过不确定性驱动的方式自适应调整推理深度，以解决CTR预测中特征稀疏性问题，在四个数据集和线上A/B测试中均取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CTR模型存在根本性不对称：训练中充分覆盖的特征组合能给出置信预测，而稀疏观察到的特征组合产生不可靠输出。现有训练阶段方案（如自适应门控）受限于同样的稀疏性问题，无法在部署时为每个实例提供定制化处理。

Method: 提出UTTSI框架，核心包含：1) 双信号估计器，结合模型logit置信度与数据级频率先验，区分认知不确定性与偶然不确定性；2) 自适应特征过滤，移除不可靠嵌入；3) 对不确定实例进行随机特征路径探索，通过一致性加权集成聚合预测；4) 置信实例跳过探索，保持平均开销约为基础模型的2.8倍，最坏情况延迟不变。

Result: 在四个数据集、三种骨干架构上，UTTSI一致且统计显著地优于所有训练阶段基线方法。七天线上A/B测试确认5.3%的相对CTR提升（p < 0.01）。

Conclusion: 选择性测试时计算分配可以作为训练阶段进展的实用补充，为CTR预测提供了一种新的范式——在部署阶段按需分配计算资源，而非仅在训练阶段优化模型。

Abstract: Scaling test-time compute has proven highly effective for language models, yet this opportunity remains largely unexplored for industrial Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction. CTR models suffer from a fundamental asymmetry: feature combinations well-represented in training yield confident predictions, while sparsely observed ones produce unreliable outputs. Existing training-phase solutions such as adaptive gating learn a fixed selection function subject to the same sparsity, offering no per-instance recourse at deployment.We propose UTTSI (Uncertainty-Triggered Test-Time Selective Inference), a training-free model-agnostic framework that scales inference depth proportionally to per-instance uncertainty. A dual-signal estimator combining model logit confidence with a data-level frequency prior distinguishes epistemic uncertainty from aleatoric ambiguity. Every instance undergoes adaptive feature filtering to remove unreliable embeddings; uncertain instances additionally receive stochastic feature-path explorations whose predictions are aggregated via consistency-weighted ensembling. Confident instances bypass exploration entirely, keeping average overhead at approximately $2.8\times$ base model cost with worst-case latency unchanged.Experiments on four datasets with three backbone architectures demonstrate consistent, statistically significant gains over all training-phase baselines. A seven-day online A/B test further confirms a 5.3% relative CTR gain ($p < 0.01$), establishing selective test-time compute allocation as a practical complement to training-phase advances for CTR prediction.

</details>


### [456] [TUBE: Tangent Upper Bound on Evidence for Discrete Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24292)
*Arseny Ivanov,Sergei Kholkin,Vladislav Gromadskii,Grigoriy Ksenofontov,Ivan Oseledets,Alexander Korotin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TUBE，一种可以无偏估计对数似然上界的方法，用于评估离散扩散模型。实验表明，块掩码扩散模型和块任意顺序自回归模型的似然严格低于标准自回归模型，说明自回归模型在似然指标上仍占主导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散扩散模型无法精确计算对数似然，现有评估依赖ELBO下界，不确定性较高，需要一种上界方法来更准确地评估模型表现。

Method: 提出TUBE（Tangent Upper Bound on Evidence），一种变分上界，可以无偏蒙特卡洛估计对数似然，适用于掩码扩散模型、任意顺序自回归模型及其块变体。

Result: 在块掩码扩散模型和块任意顺序自回归模型上，TUBE显示这些模型的似然严格低于精确的自回归模型基线。

Conclusion: 自回归模型在似然指标上仍然优于离散扩散模型及其变体。

Abstract: Log-likelihood is a standard metric for evaluating generative models. Unfortunately, in contrast to autoregressive models (ARMs), discrete diffusion models generally do not admit exact computation of this quantity. Existing evaluations, therefore, rely on the evidence lower bound (ELBO), leaving unclear how much higher the true value may be. We address this by introducing the Tangent Upper Bound on Evidence (TUBE), a variational upper bound on log-likelihood that admits an unbiased Monte Carlo estimator. Our TUBE extends across latent-variable models, including masked diffusion models (MDMs), any-order ARMs (AO-ARMs), and block variants of both. Applied to block MDMs and block AO-ARMs, TUBE reveals our key empirical finding that these models lie strictly below the exact ARM baseline, showing that ARMs still dominate in likelihood.

</details>


### [457] [Private Adaptive Covariance Estimation via Gaussian Graphical Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24295)
*Cecilia Ferrando,Miguel Fuentes,Brett Mullins,Cameron Musco,Daniel Sheldon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PACE-GGM是一种数据自适应的差分隐私协方差估计方法，通过将隐私预算集中用于信息量最丰富的经验协方差矩阵条目，并利用最大熵重建高斯图模型，在高维和低到中等隐私场景下显著优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私协方差估计方法对所有条目均匀添加噪声，导致高维数据下噪声过大、估计精度低。作者希望设计一种数据自适应的方法，将有限的隐私预算集中用于最重要的协方差条目，从而提升估计精度。

Method: 该方法迭代进行：每轮选择当前近似最差的协方差条目，使用高斯机制对该条目进行带差分隐私的测量，然后通过最大熵重建目标重新构造完整的协方差矩阵，最终形成高斯图模型结构。

Result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，PACE-GGM在估计误差上一致优于高斯机制及其他基线方法，尤其在高维数据和低到中等隐私预算（低隐私保护强度）的场景下提升显著。

Conclusion: 数据自适应地分配隐私预算到关键条目可以有效提升差分隐私协方差估计的质量，PACE-GGM为此提供了一种可行的框架，在高维实际应用中具有潜力。

Abstract: We propose PACE-GGM, a data-adaptive differentially private method for covariance estimation that concentrates its privacy budget on the most informative entries of the empirical covariance matrix, rather than perturbing all entries. This applies in the natural setting where the modeler supplies separate bounds for each variable, so that individual entries can be measured with less noise than the full matrix. In each round, our method selects a poorly approximated entry, measures it using the Gaussian mechanism, and then reconstructs a full covariance matrix using a maximum-entropy reconstruction objective, leading to a Gaussian graphical model structure. Experiments on diverse real-world datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in estimation error with respect to the Gaussian mechanism and other baselines, particularly in high-dimensional and low-to-moderate privacy regimes.

</details>


### [458] [LLMs Show No Signs Of Individuated Metacognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24299)
*M. Moran,Mark Whiting*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究通过因子分析和成对校准，检验了20个前沿大语言模型在六个基准上的二元置信度判断，发现跨模型的置信度矩阵近似秩为1，主导因子捕捉了大多数潜在方差；一旦移除所有模型一致同意的项目，置信度与表现之间的关系就消失，且模型间的成对校准很小甚至不存在。这表明没有显著证据表明LLM存在可验证的、个体化的功能元认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究假设语言模型的置信度能反映其实际能力（功能元认知），但多数研究仅关注聚合校准，对置信度背后的结构理解不足。本文旨在系统检验前沿LLM是否具备可验证的个体化元认知能力。

Method: 对20个前沿LLM在六个基准上的二元置信度判断进行四分量因子分析（tetrachoric factor analysis），并结合成对校准（pairwise calibration），检验两个模型在置信度不同时是否也表现不同。

Result: 事实回忆和信息检索基准上，跨模型置信度矩阵近似秩为1，单一主导因子捕获大部分潜在方差；移除所有模型一致同意的项目后，置信度与表现关系消失；模型间成对校准即使统计显著也很小，控制共享因子上的基率差异后归零；数学推理看似例外，实则是推理模型在思维链中回答问题本身所致。

Conclusion: 在任何测试领域中，没有发现显著证据表明LLM存在可验证的、个体化的功能元认知，即模型无法在不行使能力的情况下评估自身能力。

Abstract: Confidence-weighted routing, selective abstention, and ensemble weighting all assume that a model's stated confidence is informative about its capability on the question being asked. They presume functional metacognition, the capacity to assess one's own capabilities, without exercising them. Aggregate calibration is well studied, with mixed results, but the underlying structure of elicited confidence is less well understood. We decompose binary confidence judgements from 20 frontier Large Language Models (LLMs) across six benchmarks using tetrachoric factor analysis paired with pairwise calibration, asking whether two models that differ in confidence also differ in performance. On factual recall and information retrieval benchmarks the cross-model confidence matrix is approximately rank-one and a single dominant factor captures most of the latent variance. Models retrieving facts share an item-level difficulty axis and differ mainly in their decision thresholds along it. Across all benchmarks the relationship between confidence and performance collapses once items that all models agree on are removed. Inter-model pairwise calibration is small even where statistically significant, and what remains shrinks to nothing once base-rate differences along the shared factor are controlled for. Mathematical reasoning is the apparent exception, but this turns out to be a confound where reasoning models answer questions about their confidence by trying to solve them in their chain of thought, bypassing the sub-symbolic self-knowledge we seek to measure. We find no evidence for significant verbalised individuated metacognition in any tested domain.

</details>


### [459] [ChaosBench-Logic v2: Evaluating LLM Logical Reasoning over Dynamical Systems at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24305)
*Noel Thomas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了ChaosBench-Logic v2基准（40,886题，覆盖165个动力系统）和CARE评估协议，揭示二元推理基准中隐藏的失败模式。14个模型评估显示：状态转换推理接近随机（MCC=0.05），但给定前提的一阶逻辑推理可达MCC=0.52；闭源模型优势集中在跨指标和一致性任务，开源Qwen 2.5-32B在指标诊断方面占优（0.91 vs 0.45）；两个模型在分岔问题上出现系统性负相关（负MCC）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准二元推理基准在评估模型时掩盖了关键失败模式：先验崩塌、释义不一致性，以及无法推理参数依赖的动态系统行为。需要更细粒度的基准和评估协议来揭示这些缺陷。

Method: 构建ChaosBench-Logic v2基准（40,886题，165个动力系统，27个一阶逻辑谓词，78条公理边），设计CARE评估协议，在14个模型上进行系统评估。

Result: 状态转换推理接近随机（MCC=0.05），FOL推理MCC=0.52。闭源模型在跨指标（+0.40）和一致性任务上占优，Qwen 2.5-32B在指标诊断上达0.91。两个模型在分岔问题上出现系统性负MCC。

Conclusion: 当前模型在参数依赖动态系统推理方面存在严重不足，不同模型家族在特定推理任务上各具优劣，且存在系统性反相关等反常行为。

Abstract: Standard accuracy on binary reasoning benchmarks hides critical failure modes: prior collapse, inconsistency under paraphrase, and inability to reason about parameter-dependent dynamics. We present ChaosBench-Logic v2, a 40,886-question benchmark over 165 dynamical systems with 27 FOL predicates and 78 axiom edges, together with CARE (Calibration- and Adversarial-Robust Evaluation), a protocol that surfaces these pathologies. Evaluating 14 models, we find that regime-transition reasoning remains near random (MCC = 0.05) even for frontier models, whereas FOL deduction with given premises reaches MCC = 0.52. Per-family decomposition shows that the proprietary-model advantage concentrates on cross-indicator (+0.40) and consistency tasks, while open-source Qwen 2.5-32B dominates indicator diagnostics (0.91 vs. 0.45). Two models exhibit negative MCC on bifurcation questions, confirmed as systematic anti-correlation via confusion-matrix analysis.

</details>


### [460] [From One-Pass SGD to Data Reuse: Mini-Batch Scaling Laws in Sketched Linear Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24316)
*Ziyan Chen,Ding-Xuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在幂律谱和源条件下，草图线性回归的批次缩放定律，分析了三种采样协议（单遍、多遍有放回、多遍无放回），发现它们共享相同的不可约项和近似项，但随机项不同。单遍批次SGD的方差随批次大小B和有效步数T_eff变化，多遍方法中无放回采样噪声更低（B=N时退化为确定性梯度下降）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有缩放定律理论主要关注单样本SGD或全数据重用，未清晰阐明小批量（mini-batching）的作用。本文旨在将批次规模纳入缩放定律的理论框架，揭示批次大小如何影响预测误差。

Method: 对草图线性回归进行理论分析，假设协方差谱为幂律分布且目标参数满足源条件。推导了单遍批次SGD、多遍有放回批次SGD和多遍无放回批次SGD的风险分解，并证明各自的缩放定律。

Result: 1）三种方法共享不可约项和近似项，随机项不同；2）单遍方法中方差为O(min(M, (T_eff γ)^{1/a})/(B T_eff))，1/B协方差缩减在固定更新次数下成立，但在单遍区被缩短的优化步数部分抵消；3）多遍方法中无放回采样的波动协方差因子为ρ_{N,B}，低于有放回的1/B，B=N时波动消失。

Conclusion: 批次大小可与计算量、数据量、模型维度并列，成为缩放定律中同等理论基础地位的因素；同时揭示了无放回采样在减少噪声方面的优势。

Abstract: Scaling laws provide compact descriptions of how prediction error varies with compute, model size, and data, but existing theory mainly treats single-sample SGD or full data reuse, leaving the role of mini-batching unclear. We study batch scaling laws for sketched linear regression under a power-law covariance spectrum and a source condition on the target parameter. We analyze one-pass batch SGD, multi-pass batch SGD with replacement, and multi-pass batch SGD without replacement. Our first result is a risk decomposition: all three procedures share the same irreducible and approximation terms, while their stochastic terms depend on the sampling protocol. One-pass batch SGD splits into bias and variance, whereas the two multi-pass methods split into GD bias, GD variance, and a fluctuation term around a common GD reference trajectory. We then prove source-condition scaling laws for one-pass and multi-pass mini-batch methods. For one-pass batch SGD, mini-batching preserves the approximation and optimization-bias exponents, while the variance scales as $O(\min(M,(T_{\mathrm{eff}}γ)^{1/a})/(B T_{\mathrm{eff}}))$. Thus the usual $1/B$ covariance reduction holds at fixed update count $T$, but in the one-pass regime $T=N/B$ it is partly offset by the shorter optimization horizon. For multi-pass batch SGD, with- and without-replacement sampling have identical approximation and GD bias/variance terms; they differ only in the fluctuation covariance prefactor, which is $1/B$ with replacement and $ρ_{N,B}=(N-B)/(B(N-1))$ without replacement. Hence without-replacement sampling is less noisy for $B>1$, and when $B=N$ the fluctuation vanishes, recovering deterministic gradient descent. These results place batch size on the same theoretical footing as compute, data, and model dimension in sketched linear regression.

</details>


### [461] [Omissive Bias in Religious Representation: Benchmarking LLM Answers to Everyday Ethical Decision-making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24319)
*David Wingate,Sheryl Carty,Joshua Coates,Daniel Feldman,Nancy Fulda,Larry Howell,Brett Israelson,Dallin Jacobs,Jonathan Karr,John Paul Kimes,Elisabeth Kincaid,Paul Martens,Gavin Mobley,Suzana Pinheiro,Lindsay Slemboski,Peter Whiting*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出“遗漏偏见”(omissive bias)概念，评估LLM在回答伦理和个人问题时是否系统性地遗漏宗教视角。通过构建AllFaith基准（150个问题）和人类调查，测试27个模型发现LLM相比人类期望普遍低估宗教，尤其在实用型个人问题上更为明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM日益成为个人、道德和存在问题的默认信息来源，但宗教框架在历史上深刻塑造了这类推理。现有研究主要关注政治倾向或社会偏见（即模型“说了什么不该说的”），而忽略了模型“没说什么该说的”——即宗教代表的缺失作为价值对齐和偏见的维度。

Method: 1) 构建AllFaith基准：150个伦理和个人问题（来源于真实聊天记录和信仰社区贡献者），问题本身不直接关于宗教，但宗教是其中一种有价值的视角。2) 设计LLM-as-judge评估标准：只要提及任何宗教、宗教实践或宗教领袖即得满分。3) 开展人类被试调查，对比LLM行为与人类期望。4) 评估27个模型。

Result: LLM系统性地低估了宗教代表（相对于人类期望）。遗漏是不对称的：模型在抽象存在性问题（意义、死亡、真理）上更容易诉诸宗教，而在实用型个人情境（悲伤、婚姻、家庭冲突、成瘾）——即许多人最依赖宗教的领域——反而更少提及。

Conclusion: 当前LLM的回答忽略了反映宗教框架的关键机会，而许多人在应对个人和伦理挑战时确实依赖这些框架。作者不试图裁定LLM应该持有何种价值观，而是指出这种遗漏偏见本身值得关注。

Abstract: As large language models become a default source of guidance on personal, moral, and existential questions, it matters whether they draw on the religious frameworks that have historically shaped such reasoning, or systematically omit them. In this paper, we ask a deliberately narrow question: when posed an everyday ethical question for which religious perspectives may be valuable, do LLMs invoke religion at all? In contrast to benchmarks that look for the presence of political leanings or social bias, we look for the absence of religious representation as a dimension of value alignment and bias in LLMs. We term this ``omissive bias.''
  To measure omissive bias, we contribute the AllFaith Religious Representation Benchmark: 150 ethically and personally salient questions, sourced from in-the-wild chat transcripts and faith-community contributors, paired with an LLM-as-judge rubric that gives full credit for any mention of a religion, a religious practice, or a religious leader. The questions are not themselves about religion--they are open-ended questions about grief, forgiveness, relationships, purpose, and honesty, where religion is one valuable perspective among several. We also run a human-subjects survey to compare LLM behavior against human expectations.
  Evaluating 27 models, we find that LLMs consistently underrepresent religion relative to human expectations. The omission is asymmetric: models invoke religion more readily for abstract existential questions (meaning, death, truth) than for the practical personal situations--grief, marriage, family conflict, addiction--where many people most rely on it. It is not our purpose to adjudicate which values LLMs should hold. We argue, more modestly, that current LLM responses overlook critical opportunities to reflect religious frameworks that many people draw on when navigating personal and ethical challenges.

</details>


### [462] [Interdomain Attention: Beyond Token-Level Key-Value Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24330)
*Naoki Kiyohara,Harrison Bo Hua Zhu,Riccardo El Hassanin,Zhuo Sun,Wenlong Chen,Samir Bhatt,Yingzhen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Interdomain Attention，通过核方法将SSM集成到注意力模块中，用固定大小的状态实现查询条件化的注意力机制，在1.3B语言模型上超越softmax基线，并继承了SSM的长度平坦特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer的注意力机制需要KV缓存且成本随序列长度二次增长，而深度SSM将上下文压缩为固定大小的循环状态但缺乏查询-键匹配的直接寻址能力。作者希望结合两者的优势：注意力的内容寻址能力与SSM的固定状态高效性。

Method: 通过核方法将注意力核近似为有限特征映射，将键特征和值投影到由单个SSM循环维护的共享基函数集上，每个查询通过自己的特征映射关注压缩后的系数，从而在固定大小的状态上实现查询条件化的注意力。可扩展层是该推导的学习松弛版本。

Result: 在125M到1.3B的自回归语言模型实验中，Interdomain Attention在每个规模上都优于SSM分词混合器，在1.3B规模上验证集困惑度和8个常识任务上超越相同配方的softmax基线，且训练上下文3.5倍长度外推时保持固定状态核心的长度平坦行为。

Conclusion: 查询条件化投影是性能提升的主要来源，Interdomain Attention成功融合了注意力和SSM的优势。

Abstract: Transformers and deep state space models (SSMs) sit at opposite ends of a basic design choice: attention routes each query through a growing key-value (KV) cache by content-based matching at quadratic cost, while deep SSMs compress context into a fixed-size recurrent state that is not directly addressed by query-key matching. We propose Interdomain Attention, which integrates an SSM into an attention module through kernel methods: an attention kernel is approximated by a finite feature map, the resulting key features and values are projected onto a shared set of basis functions maintained by a single SSM recurrence, and each query attends to the compressed coefficients through its own feature map, recovering query-conditioned attention over a fixed-size state. The scalable layer is a learned relaxation of this derivation, and we validate its components through ablations. In a 125M to 1.3B autoregressive language-modeling study on FineWeb-Edu at matched recurrent-state budget, Interdomain Attention improves on an SSM token mixer at every scale, surpasses a same-recipe softmax baseline at 1.3B on validation perplexity and on the eight-task commonsense suite, and inherits the length-flat behavior of its fixed-state core out to 3.5x the training context. Ablations indicate that the query-conditioned projection is the main source of the gain.

</details>


### [463] [CurveRL: Principled Distribution-Aware Context Reweighting for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24331)
*Ke Sun,Yizhou Zhao,Jiayi Xin,Qi Long,Weijie Su*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了CurveRL，一种基于分位数坐标变换的分布感知提示重加权方法，从理论上统一了RLVR中的提示重加权框架，并在多项基准上超越GRPO等方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法中提示重加权的原理尚不明确，缺乏统一的框架来理解什么样的权重是最优的。

Method: 将提示重加权形式化为通过率函数空间上效用泛函的泛函导数，得到统一最优性框架；基于该框架提出CurveRL，利用分位数坐标变换实现分布感知的提示重加权，权重取决于通过率的排名和密度而非绝对值。

Result: 在多个基准测试上，CurveRL一致性地优于GRPO及其他RLVR基线方法。

Conclusion: 将上下文分布控制确立为分析和设计提示重加权RLVR算法的一个原则性维度。

Abstract: Context or prompt-level reweighting has emerged as a central algorithmic lever in Reinforcement Learning with Verified Rewards (RLVR) for improving the reasoning capability of large language models, yet the principle determining what constitutes an optimal weighting remains poorly understood. We address this gap by formulating prompt reweighting as a functional derivative of a utility functional defined in the pass-rate function space, yielding a unified optimality framework that accommodates existing schemes, including REINFORCE and GRPO. Building on this optimality framework, we propose a distribution-aware prompt reweighting approach, called CurveRL, based on a quantile coordinate transform, in which the weight assigned to each prompt depends not on the absolute value of pass rates but on its rank and density to reflect the distributional structure of the pass rates in the learning dynamics. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed CurveRL consistently outperforms GRPO and other RLVR baselines. Our study identifies context-distribution control as a principled axis for analyzing and designing prompt-reweighted RLVR algorithms. The code is released in https://github.com/zhyzmath/CurveRL.

</details>


### [464] [ChainzRule: Sample-Efficient, Robust Deep Learning Across Tabular, NLP, and Vision Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24340)
*Rowan Martnishn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ChainzRule (CR)架构，用可学习多项式层替代传统激活函数，结合微分正则化(DREG)在标准推理成本下强制低频率、结构稳定的表示，在五个领域实验中以更少数据和参数取得优于SVM、XGBoost、RNTN、BERT-base等基线的结果，并提出梯度尾比τ作为样本效率和模型可靠性的度量指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实企业深度学习系统面临标注数据昂贵、推理预算紧张、模型可解释性差等约束，而学术基准测试常常忽视这些问题。现有模型在数据效率、计算成本和可解释性方面难以满足实际部署需求。

Method: 提出ChainzRule (CR)架构，核心是用可学习多项式层替代标准激活函数。引入微分正则化(DREG)，即在前向传播过程中以解析方式计算逐层雅可比矩阵惩罚项，且不增加标准推理成本。通过约束中间导数迫使网络学习低频率、结构稳定的表示。

Result: Pima糖尿病85.71%±2.01%（优于SVM和XGBoost）；SST-5情感分类46.20%±0.37%（冻结编码器，仅用RNTN约5%训练数据）；SST-5微调BERT骨干55.79%（优于BERT-base线性头54.9%）；Yelp Full有序回归70.17%（3.2M参数，优于10模型平均66.35%）；CIFAR-10-C平均损坏准确率+2.32%。所有报告的p值经Bonferroni校正后低于α=0.05。梯度尾比τ维持在1.01-1.02，远优于所有基线(1.07-1.09)。

Conclusion: CR架构通过微分正则化有效提升了样本效率、分布外鲁棒性和模型可解释性，梯度尾比τ可作为部署时模型可靠性的代理指标。该方法在多个领域、多种任务上以更少数据和参数取得显著优于传统模型的效果。

Abstract: Production deep learning systems across enterprise domains operate under constraints that academic benchmarks routinely obscure: labeled data is expensive, inference budgets are tight, and models that cannot explain their behavior are difficult to trust and maintain. We present ChainzRule (CR), a neural architecture replacing typical activations with learnable polynomial layers governed by Differential Regularization (DREG), a layer-wise Jacobian penalty computed analytically during the forward pass at standard inference cost. The core claim is that bounding intermediate derivatives forces the network toward low-frequency, structurally stable representations, simultaneously reducing dependence on labeled data volume, improving robustness to distribution shift, and providing a measurable, gradient-based handle on model behavior. Evaluated across five domains, CR achieves $85.71\% \pm 2.01\%$ on Pima Diabetes (statistically superior to SVM and XGBoost), $46.20\% \pm 0.37\%$ on SST-5 sentiment classification with a frozen encoder (superior to RNTN using approximately 5\% of its training data), $55.79\%$ on SST-5 with a fine-tuned BERT backbone (versus BERT-base linear head at $54.9\%$), $70.17\%$ on Yelp Full ordinal regression with 3.2M parameters versus a 10-model average of $66.35\%$, and $+2.32\%$ mean corruption accuracy on CIFAR-10-C. All results with reported $p$-values fall below the $α= 0.05$ threshold after Bonferroni correction. CR maintains a gradient tail ratio $τ$ (p99/mean) of $1.01$--$1.02$ against $1.07$--$1.09$ for all typical activation function baselines across every data fraction, a structural invariant we propose as the mechanistic driver of sample efficiency and a deployment-time proxy for model reliability.

</details>


### [465] [Evolving Robustness--Exploration Trade-off in Online Reinforcement Learning via Quantile Bayesian Risk MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24345)
*Meichen Song,Yuhao Wang,Enlu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于分位数贝叶斯风险感知MDP的在线强化学习算法，通过自适应分位数调度来平衡鲁棒性与探索之间的时变权衡，并证明了次线性贝叶斯遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线强化学习中，早期数据稀缺导致认知不确定性，需要鲁棒性；但充分探索对学习真实最优策略也至关重要。现有方法未有效处理这种随时间变化的鲁棒性-探索权衡。

Method: 构建分位数贝叶斯风险感知MDP（BR-MDP），其中分位数水平控制后验不确定性如何进入Bellman备份。通过渐近正态性结果刻画分位数水平对乐观/悲观程度的影响，并设计自适应分位数调度：早期强调鲁棒性，逐渐鼓励探索未充分访问的状态-动作对。

Result: 建立了关于真实最优值和最优BR-MDP鲁棒值的次线性贝叶斯遗憾界。数值实验表明该方法在探索需求高和探索成本高的环境中均表现优异。

Conclusion: 分位数BR-MDP提供了一种理论优雅且实用的框架，能自适应地平衡鲁棒性与探索，为在线RL中处理认知不确定性提供了新视角。

Abstract: In online reinforcement learning, data scarcity creates epistemic uncertainty that makes robustness important early in learning, whereas sufficient exploration is needed to learn the true-environment optimal policy. We study this time-varying robustness--exploration trade-off through a quantile Bayesian risk-aware Markov decision process (BR-MDP), in which the quantile level controls how posterior uncertainty enters the Bellman backup. We characterize this control through an asymptotic normality result for the difference between the quantile BR-MDP value and the value in the true environment. The result implies that upper/lower-tail quantiles induce optimism/pessimism towards epistemic uncertainty, and the magnitude of the optimism/pessimism decreases as data accumulate. Building on this characterization, we propose an online Bayesian risk-aware algorithm with an adaptive quantile schedule that emphasizes robustness early and gradually encourages exploration of less-visited state--action pairs. We establish sublinear Bayesian regret bounds with respect to both the true optimal value and the optimal BR-MDP robust value. Numerical experiments demonstrate strong performance in both exploration-demanding and exploration-costly environments.

</details>


### [466] [Refined Analysis of Entropy-Regularized Actor-Critic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24357)
*Safwan Labbi,Paul Mangold,Daniil Tiapkin,Eric Moulines*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文深入分析了熵正则化折扣有限MDP中actor-critic方法的critic作用，证明了精确critic可作为强意义上的方差缩减方法，使随机梯度actor-critic达到与确定性策略梯度相当的样本复杂度（$\tilde{O}(\log(1/\varepsilon))$）。当critic误差足够小时，方差缩减和快速收敛得以保持，强调了准确估计critic的关键性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在熵正则化有限折扣环境中，actor-critic方法中critic的具体作用，特别是其作为baseline对方差缩减和样本复杂度的影响。

Method: 理论分析：首先证明精确critic作为baseline时具有强方差缩减性质；然后分析实际中critic与actor共同学习时，critic的方差和偏差如何影响actor更新；最后给出critic误差足够小条件下保持快速收敛的条件。

Result: 精确critic下，actor-critic可达到$\tilde{O}(\log(1/\varepsilon))$的样本复杂度；critic误差足够小时，方差缩减和快速收敛得以保持。

Conclusion: 准确估计critic对actor-critic方法至关重要，建议先学习critic并在每次actor更新后保持其更新。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the role of the critic in actor--critic for entropy-regularized, finite, discounted environments. We establish that, when the critic is exact, using the latter as a baseline is a variance-reduction method in a strong sense. In this case, actor--critic with stochastic gradients matches the sample complexity of deterministic policy gradient, reaching an $ε$-optimal regularized value with $\tilde{O}(\log(1/ε))$ samples. In practice, the critic is learned alongside the actor: the variance of the actor update is then influenced by the critic's variance and bias. Specifically, when the critic has a sufficiently small error, the variance reduction and rapid convergence are preserved. This suggests to learn the critic first, keeping it up to date after each actor update, underscoring the crucial role of accurate critic estimation in actor--critic methods.

</details>


### [467] [Treatment Effect Estimation with Differentiated Networked Effect on Graph Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24358)
*Xiaofeng Lin,Han Bao,Hisashi Kashima*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对图数据中个体治疗效果（ITE）估计的干扰问题，提出了一种捕捉差异化网络效应（DNE）的新机制，通过部分注意力机制和消息放大器分别建模邻居重要性和规模，在三个真实图上取得了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在ITE估计中忽略了差异化网络效应（DNE），即邻居重要性和规模不同导致的干扰差异，导致估计不精确和决策误导。

Method: 提出包含两个部分注意力机制（估计不同邻居的干扰重要性）和一个消息放大器（根据邻居规模调整干扰建模结果）的新型干扰建模机制。

Result: 在三个真实世界图数据上的实验表明，该方法优于现有ITE估计方法，验证了显式捕捉DNE的重要性。

Conclusion: 差异化网络效应（DNE）是ITE估计中不可忽视的关键因素，所提方法通过显式建模DNE显著提升了估计精度。

Abstract: Estimating individual treatment effect (ITE) from observational graph data is crucial for decision-making in the fields such as commerce and medicine. This task is challenging due to interference, where individual outcomes can be influenced by the treatments and covariates of their neighbors. Existing methods attempt to model such interference for accurate ITE estimation. However, a critical issue is often overlooked: differentiated networked effect (DNE), an effect caused by local networks consisting of neighbors with varying importance and scales. Capturing DNE is vital; otherwise, we will end up with imprecise ITE estimation due to an erroneous characterization of interference, which can result in misguided decisions. To address this challenge, we propose a novel interference modeling mechanism that incorporates two partial attention mechanisms and a message amplifier. The partial attention mechanisms automatically estimate the importance of different neighbors in contributing to interference, while the message amplifier adjusts the results of the interference modeling mechanism based on the scale of neighbors, all of which enables the model to capture DNE. Experiments on three real-world graphs demonstrate that our methods outperform existing approaches for ITE estimation from graph data, which corroborates the importance of explicitly capturing DNE.

</details>


### [468] [GEESE: Genotype-aware End-to-End Spatio-temporal Embedding for Behavioral Phenotyping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24370)
*Yiran Ding,Yuen Gao,Chunqi Qian,Zijun Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GEESE是一个端到端深度学习框架，直接从3D姿态动力学中学习行为表征，无需手工特征工程。在三种自闭症相关基因模型上，它超越了传统方法，并提供了HONK自然语言交互工具，使非编程研究人员也能进行行为表型分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前遗传动物模型的行为表型分析依赖人工特征工程，耗时且缺乏可重复性和可扩展性。

Method: 采用预训练的时间序列基础模型，将运动序列编码到行为流形中，同时支持行为分类和基因型预测。

Result: 在CNTNAP2、CHD8、FMR1三种自闭症相关基因模型上，深度学习方法的性能超越了手工特征基线，且能够泛化到不同遗传背景。

Conclusion: 学习到的表征能够捕捉基因型特异的行为特征，并可通过HONK工具降低使用门槛，让非编程人员也能参与分析。

Abstract: Behavioral phenotyping of genetic animal models currently requires labor-intensive manual feature engineering that limits reproducibility and scalability. We present GEESE, an end-to-end deep learning framework that learns behavioral representations directly from 3D pose dynamics without hand-crafted features. Using a pretrained time series foundation model, we encode movement sequences into a behavioral manifold that supports both behavior classification and genotype prediction. Evaluated across three autism-associated genetic models (CNTNAP2, CHD8, FMR1), our deep learning approach surpasses hand-crafted feature baselines in both tasks, revealing that learned representations capture genotype-specific behavioral signatures. The framework generalizes across genetic backgrounds, and an all-cohort model identifies both genetic background and genotype from movement patterns alone. We further provide HONK, an interactive intelligent tool enabling researchers without programming expertise to perform behavioral phenotyping from pose data through natural language interaction.

</details>


### [469] [Assessing the Operational Viability of Foundation Models for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24381)
*Kavin Soni,Debanshu Das,Vamshi Guduguntla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估了时间序列基础模型与监督学习方法在不同操作场景下的表现，提出了一种基于复杂度的路由机制，能根据序列特征动态选择最优模型，在精度和推理成本上均优于单一通用基础模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列预测在金融、交通、能源等领域至关重要。尽管监督学习表现优异，但需要领域特定的训练、特征工程和持续维护。基础模型作为零样本替代方案出现，但尚不清楚其在哪些场景下真正优于监督方法。

Method: 将基础模型与监督方法在四个操作场景（周期性人本系统、物理约束过程、随机金融市场、异质需求预测）中进行系统对比，分析准确性、推理延迟、数据漂移适应性和部署约束。并提出Complexity Router，利用经验特征将每个序列分配给最优模型类别。

Result: 基础模型在具有可迁移周期模式的领域表现良好，适合冷启动或长尾场景；监督方法在严格物理约束系统中保持更高精度；金融领域中新基础模型正迅速缩小差距。选择性路由机制相比通用基础模型实现了更高准确率和更低推理成本。

Conclusion: 不同预测场景适合不同模型类别，混合路由策略能在泛化性和效率之间取得更好平衡，为实际部署提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Time series forecasting drives operational decisions in areas like finance, transportation, and energy. While supervised learning approaches achieve strong performance, they require domain-specific training, feature engineering, and ongoing maintenance. Large-scale foundation models have recently emerged as a zero-shot alternative, avoiding task-specific training much like LLMs. In this work, we evaluate foundation models against standard supervised approaches. Rather than focusing solely on aggregate accuracy, we analyze performance across four operational regimes: periodic human-centric systems, physically constrained processes, stochastic financial markets, and heterogeneous demand forecasting.
  Our results characterize optimal deployment areas. Foundation models perform well in domains with transferable periodic structures and are efficient for cold-start or long-tail scenarios. Conversely, supervised specialists maintain higher precision in systems governed by strict physical constraints. In financial domains, newer foundation models are rapidly closing the performance gap with supervised specialists. We further quantify trade-offs in inference latency, data drift adaptability, and deployment constraints. Finally, we propose a Complexity Router that assigns each series to the optimal model class using empirical features. We demonstrate that this selective routing achieves higher accuracy and significantly lower inference costs compared to deploying a universal foundation model, providing a practical framework for balancing generalization and efficiency.

</details>


### [470] [Learning Laplacian Eigenspace with Mass-Aware Neural Operators on Point Clouds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24390)
*Zherui Yang,Tao Du,Ligang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出神经特征空间算子(NEO)，通过预测稳定的低频子空间而非直接回归特征向量，实现从点云高效预测拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的谱分解，具有近线性时间复杂度和良好的零样本泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模数据上求解拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子(LBO)的低频特征模计算成本极高，传统迭代求解器成为瓶颈，亟需一种能摊销该计算成本的替代方案。

Method: 1) 学习稳定的不变低维子空间而非直接回归特征向量，规避符号翻转和旋转歧义；2) 预测冗余基函数并通过轻量Rayleigh-Ritz精化恢复准确特征对；3) 提出质量感知神经算子，将逐点面积权重融入注意力聚合，提升对非均匀采样的鲁棒性。

Result: 近线性运行时间，相比迭代求解器取得显著的加速比且精度相当；对高分辨率点云展现出强零样本迁移能力；支持标准谱几何任务，原始基函数可作为下游学习的逐点特征。

Conclusion: NEO通过神经算子预测子空间的方式有效解决了LBO谱分解的计算瓶颈，在效率和泛化性上均优于传统方法，为大规模几何分析提供了实用工具。

Abstract: The eigendecomposition of the Laplace--Beltrami Operator (LBO) is fundamental to geometric analysis, yet computing its low-frequency eigenmodes remains a significant bottleneck due to the high cost of iterative solvers on large-scale data. To amortize this cost, we introduce the Neural Eigenspace Operator (NEO), a feed-forward framework designed to predict the spectrum directly from point clouds. Crucially, NEO circumvents the ill-posed nature of standard eigenvector regression, which suffers from intrinsic sign flips and rotation ambiguities, by learning the stable, invariant low-frequency subspace instead. Specifically, the network predicts a redundant set of basis functions whose span robustly covers the target eigenspace, allowing for the recovery of accurate eigenpairs via a lightweight Rayleigh--Ritz refinement. To handle irregular sampling, we propose a mass-aware neural operator that incorporates per-point area weights into attention-based aggregation, improving robustness to non-uniform densities and enabling zero-shot generalization across resolutions. Our approach achieves near-linear runtime scaling and substantial wall-clock speedups over iterative solvers at comparable accuracy, and exhibits strong zero-shot transfer to high-resolution point clouds. The resulting eigenpairs support standard spectral geometry tasks, while the raw basis functions provide effective point-wise features for downstream learning. Code: https://github.com/Adversarr/NEO.

</details>


### [471] [AvAtar: Learning to Align via Active Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24395)
*Qi Yu,Ruizhong Qiu,Zhichen Zeng,My T. Thai,Huan Liu,Hanghang Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种名为AvAtar的主动对齐框架，利用最优传输理论，通过梯度传播和伴随状态方法高效选择最具信息量的监督样本，从而提升对齐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于最优传输的对齐方法高度依赖稀疏且昂贵的监督信号，但缺乏如何在OT框架下主动获取高质量监督以提升对齐性能的研究。

Method: 量化候选样本的信息量时，通过熵正则化OT公式计算全局对齐结果到候选监督的梯度传播；利用伴随状态法将梯度计算转化为线性系统，并用共轭梯度法高效求解（线性复杂度、保证收敛）。

Result: 在三个代表性对齐任务上的大量实验验证了AvAtar的有效性、可扩展性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: AvAtar是一个通用的、基于最优传输的主动对齐框架，通过梯度驱动的样本选择策略有效提升对齐性能。

Abstract: Alignment plays a fundamental role in many machine learning problems, such as multi-network analysis, multimodal learning, and point cloud registration. Recent works increasingly leverage optimal transport (OT) for distributional alignment, whose effectiveness largely depends on sparse supervision that is hard or costly to obtain in practice. Existing works, however, largely overlook how to actively acquire high-quality supervision to improve their alignment performance under OT frameworks. In this paper, we propose a principled active alignment framework for optimal transport alignment called AvAtar. We quantify the informativeness of a candidate by measuring its gradient-based impact on the global alignment result, computed as the gradient propagation from the global alignment result to all possible supervisions of the candidate through the entropy-regularized OT formulation. While differentiating through OT is challenging given its constrained nature, we leverage the adjoint-state method to reformulate the computation to a linear system solvable by the conjugate gradient method with linear complexity and guaranteed convergence. By encoding the global alignment result via effective utility functions, AvAtar is applicable to general alignment problems under the OT framework. Extensive experiments on three representative alignment tasks demonstrate the effectiveness, scalability, and generalizability of the proposed AvAtar.

</details>


### [472] [Generative OOD-regularized Model-based Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24405)
*Aysin Tumay,Jiahe Huang,Elise Jortberg,Rose Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GORMPO，一种基于生成式密度建模的正则化离线强化学习算法，通过限制策略更新到高密度区域来避免OOD动作，在医疗数据集上超越基线17%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统离线RL策略在稀疏状态-动作空间中容易产生OOD动作，导致不安全策略，需要有效的方法来避免OOD区域。

Method: 将生成式密度估计模型集成到基于模型的RL方法中，提出GORMPO算法，通过密度正则化限制策略更新到数据集的高密度区域。

Result: 在真实医疗数据集上超越SOTA基线17%，在离线RL数据集上提升基础模型性能。

Conclusion: 更好的OOD检测通常带来更好的策略（稳定动态环境），而动态不确定时保守惩罚更有效。

Abstract: We study sequential decision-making with offline reinforcement learning (RL). Traditional offline RL policies may result in out-of-distribution (OOD) actions when training relies only on sparse offline representations. To ensure safe offline policies in a sparse state-action space, we explore how density estimation models can be integrated into model-based RL methods to avoid the OOD regions. Generative models are capable of explicitly modeling the density in sparse state-action spaces. Building on this, we introduce Generative OOD-regularized Model-based Policy Optimization (GORMPO), a density-regularized offline RL algorithm that uses generative density modeling to restrict policy updates to high-density areas of the dataset. Furthermore, we examine whether better OOD detection corresponds to better model-based offline policies. We compare (1) the OOD detection capabilities of various density estimators and (2) their performance within the GORMPO framework on a real-world medical dataset and sparse offline RL datasets. We theoretically guarantee GORMPO's performance under mild assumptions. Empirically, GORMPO outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 17% on a real-world medical dataset and enhances the base model on the offline RL datasets. Our empirical findings show that better OOD detection generally results in improved policies in environments with stable dynamics, while conservative penalties with poor density estimation are favored when dynamics are uncertain.

</details>


### [473] [A Unified Python Framework for Direct PPO-based Control of AHUs with Economizer Logic and CO2-Constrained Ventilation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24406)
*Erfan Haghighat Damavandi,Davide Papurello,Mahdi Alibeigi,Armin Keshavarz,Simone Canevarolo,Marco Condo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习（PPO算法）的HVAC优化方法，结合二阶RC热模型和CO2动态质量平衡，通过层次化流逻辑确保室内空气质量，并利用焓经济器实现免费冷却。实验表明，PPO智能体在温度稳定性和能效上优于传统PID和On-Off控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统HVAC控制系统难以应对建筑围护结构的非线性和随机负荷变化，导致能效低下。本文旨在利用深度强化学习解决这一难题，实现更高效、更稳定的建筑能源管理。

Method: 采用PPO算法作为核心DRL方法；构建二阶电阻-电容热模型和CO2动态质量平衡模型模拟建筑物理；创新性地提出"层次化流逻辑"机制，在CO2超过1000 ppm时覆盖智能体动作以保障室内空气质量；引入基于焓的经济器实现免费冷却；在自定义Python性能环境中进行实验。

Result: 与经遗传算法整定的PID控制器及传统On-Off控制相比，PPO智能体在温度稳定性和整体能效上表现更优。

Conclusion: 该端到端管道为在真实硬件环境中实现智能建筑能源管理提供了鲁棒且泛化的解决方案。

Abstract: Optimizing HVAC (Heating, Ventilation and Air Conditioning) can enhance a building's energy efficiency while providing comfort levels for its occupants. Using conventional control systems to maintain HVAC functions is often difficult because of the nonlinear characteristics of a building envelope as it experiences stochastic load variations over time. This paper presents a new approach to optimizing HVAC systems through the use of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms and the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm implemented in a custom Python performance environment. The DRL system uses a second order resistor-capacitor thermal model and an integrated dynamic mass balance of CO2 to replicate the complex physics associated with buildings. One major innovation of this study is a "Hierarchical Flow Logic," which provides the means to ensure that indoor air quality (IAQ) is maintained by overriding the accepted actions of the agent that cause CO2 to exceed 1000 ppm. In addition, an enthalpy-based economiser is used to create free cooling from the outdoor environment. The experimental data shows that compared to PID controllers tuned by GA or traditional On-Off controls, a PPO agent has better temperature stability and energy efficiency overall. An end-to-end pipeline provides an avenue for robust and generalized solutions to help implement smart building energy management within the context of real hardware implementation.

</details>


### [474] [Synheart Capacity: A Theory-Driven Physiological Representation of Cognitive Capacity Dynamics from Wearable Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24416)
*Yisak Debele,Henok Ademtew,Israel Goytom*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种理论驱动的多模态学习框架，通过心脏和皮电信号双流编码，在努力-压力二维空间中连续估计认知状态，在SWELL-KW数据集上取得70%+的跨个体泛化准确率，为自适应人机交互系统提供了生理基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类认知表现受限于有限的脑力资源，但如何连续计算估计认知容量动态仍是一个开放挑战。

Method: 提出理论驱动的多模态学习框架，将认知状态建模为自愿资源分配（心理努力）和超负荷压力（压力）的二维生理表征；采用心脏信号（IBI/HRV）和皮电信号（EDA）的双流编码架构，结合晚期融合与任务特定输出头，独立估计概率化的努力和压力状态。

Result: 在SWELL-KW数据集上，严格的留一被试交叉验证显示出跨个体泛化能力：压力平衡准确率70.0%，努力平衡准确率72.2%。多模态融合和理论引导的监督带来了显著性能提升。预测的状态轨迹在中断和时间压力条件下表现出差异化的响应模式。

Conclusion: 基于生理信号的多维状态表征为能够持续监控认知容量的自适应系统和人机交互提供了基础。

Abstract: Human cognitive performance is constrained by limited mental resources, yet continuous computational estimation of cognitive capacity dynamics remains an open challenge. We propose a theory-driven multimodal learning framework that models capacity-related cognitive state as a two-dimensional physiological representation defined by voluntary resource allocation (mental effort) and overload-related strain (stress). The proposed architecture combines dual-stream encoding of cardiac (IBI/HRV) and electrodermal (EDA) signals with late fusion and task-specific output heads that independently estimate probabilistic effort and stress states.
  Evaluation on the SWELL-KW dataset using strict leave-one-subject-out cross-validation demonstrates cross-individual generalization (stress: 70.0\% balanced accuracy; effort: 72.2\%), with significant gains from multimodal integration and theory-guided supervision. Rather than collapsing physiological dynamics into a single workload label, the proposed effort--stress state-space enables structured differentiation between distinct cognitive regimes, including productive engagement and overload-related strain. Predicted state trajectories exhibit significant demand-sensitive shifts under controlled workload manipulations, with effort and stress responding differentially across interruption and time-pressure conditions.
